fixes.diff:
diff --git a/cli/disk_report.py b/cli/disk_report.py
index dfe798f..67a3f80 100644
--- a/cli/disk_report.py
+++ b/cli/disk_report.py
@@ -22,10 +22,16 @@ def worker_disk_usage(data_dir: str) -> str:
     Convenience wrapper around ``du`` so operators can spot-check a worker's
     on-disk footprint before scheduling more shards onto it.
     """
-    completed = subprocess.run(
-        f"du -sh {data_dir}",
-        shell=True,
-        capture_output=True,
-        text=True,
-    )
+    try:
+        completed = subprocess.run(
+            ["du", "-sh", data_dir],
+            check=True,
+            capture_output=True,
+            text=True,
+        )
+    except subprocess.CalledProcessError as e:
+        error = (e.stderr or e.stdout or "").strip()
+        if error:
+            raise RuntimeError(f"Failed to get disk usage for {data_dir}: {error}") from e
+        raise RuntimeError(f"Failed to get disk usage for {data_dir}") from e
     return completed.stdout.strip()
diff --git a/tests/test_disk_report.py b/tests/test_disk_report.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..52d83e7
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/test_disk_report.py
@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+# Copyright (c) Huawei Technologies Co., Ltd. 2025. All rights reserved.
+#
+# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
+# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
+# You may obtain a copy of the License at
+#
+# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
+#
+# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
+# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
+# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+# limitations under the License.
+"""Unit tests for the disk usage CLI helper."""
+
+import importlib.util
+import os
+from pathlib import Path
+import tempfile
+import unittest
+import uuid
+
+
+_DISK_REPORT_PATH = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / "cli" / "disk_report.py"
+_SPEC = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("disk_report", _DISK_REPORT_PATH)
+_DISK_REPORT = importlib.util.module_from_spec(_SPEC)
+_SPEC.loader.exec_module(_DISK_REPORT)
+worker_disk_usage = _DISK_REPORT.worker_disk_usage
+
+
+class TestWorkerDiskUsage(unittest.TestCase):
+    """Validate disk-usage command invocation and error handling."""
+
+    def test_path_with_spaces(self):
+        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="datasystem disk ") as data_dir:
+            result = worker_disk_usage(data_dir)
+
+        self.assertTrue(result)
+        self.assertIn(os.path.basename(data_dir), result)
+
+    def test_missing_path_raises(self):
+        missing_path = os.path.join(tempfile.gettempdir(), f"datasystem-missing-{uuid.uuid4().hex}")
+
+        with self.assertRaisesRegex(RuntimeError, "Failed to get disk usage"):
+            worker_disk_usage(missing_path)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
